Content: Dr. Ellen Weber and our team provide compassionate, personalized dental care for the whole family. From routine cleanings to complete smile makeovers—we're here for you.
From preventive care to cosmetic enhancements, we provide a full range of services to keep your smile healthy and beautiful.
Regular exams, cleanings, fillings, and preventive care to maintain your oral health and catch issues early.
Whitening, veneers, and bonding to enhance your smile's appearance and boost your confidence.
Gentle, kid-friendly dental care in a warm environment that makes children feel comfortable and safe.
Crowns, bridges, and implants to restore damaged or missing teeth and bring back your full smile.
Prompt care when you need it most. Contact us for urgent dental issues and same-day appointments.
Comfortable sedation dentistry for patients with anxiety, ensuring a stress-free experience.
Dr. Weber has dedicated her career to providing exceptional dental care to the Palestine community. Her philosophy is simple: treat every patient like family.
With advanced training in the latest dental techniques and a gentle approach that puts patients at ease, Dr. Weber creates beautiful, healthy smiles that last a lifetime.

Fabulous dentist and staff! It has been a while since my dentist's office called and checked on me the day after a procedure. I like that! The entire staff is attentive and pleasant. They make going to the dentist a positive experience. Thanks Dr. Weber.
